task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct name and contains the required Title heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar or save dialog shows 'formatted_appraisal_form.docx'. The document contains a large heading 'Annual Performance Appraisal' styled as a Title.

task_completion.description: Verify the document uses Arial 11pt font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font family dropdown in the word processor toolbar shows 'Arial' and the font size dropdown shows '11' when text in the document is selected or being typed.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a 2x3 Employee Information Table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table with 2 rows and 3 columns (or 3 rows and 2 columns, forming a 6-cell grid) containing employee data fields (e.g., Name, Title, Department, etc.).

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a 5x2 Rating Scale Table with shading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table with 5 rows and 2 columns (or 2 rows and 5 columns) containing the numbers 1 through 5 with light gray background shading, paired with labels ranging from 'Unacceptable' to 'Outstanding'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Core Competencies Table is correctly structured with the 8 required competencies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 4-column table with bold headers: 'Competency', 'Description', 'Rating (1-5)', and 'Manager Comments'. The table must contain rows for the 8 competencies (Accountability, Customer Service, Decisiveness, Flexibility, Integrity/Honesty, Interpersonal Skills, Oral Communication, Problem Solving) and their descriptions.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the Future Goals Table with 3 empty rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table with a 3-column header ('Goal Description', 'Success Metrics', 'Target Date') and exactly 3 empty rows below the header for filling in future goals.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a signature block at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines or designated spaces at the bottom of the document for 'Employee Signature', 'Manager Signature', and 'Date'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer interface (or similar GUI word processor) being actively used to insert tables and format text, rather than just a terminal window executing a python docx script.

integrity.description: Verify the original raw text was actually converted into tables, not just appended.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should not contain large blocks of unformatted raw text from the original file; all content should be neatly organized into the requested tables.

integrity.description: Verify the agent built the tables and formatting rather than opening a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the progression of inserting tables, applying shading, and formatting text, rather than instantly opening a fully completed 'formatted_appraisal_form.docx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/formatted_appraisal_form.docx'. The document must use Arial font at exactly 11pt size. The Core Competencies table must include exactly these 8 competencies: Accountability, Customer Service, Decisiveness, Flexibility, Integrity/Honesty, Interpersonal Skills, Oral Communication, Problem Solving.
